headline: 5 Broker Friendly Stocks to Keep An Eye On as Inflation Fears Persist
summary: Inflation fears persist, but brokers are upgrading stocks like HELE, BG and AVT that have been screened for rising estimates and low price/sales.

headline: Bunge (BG) Reports Q1 Adjusted EPS of $1.83
summary: Bunge Global SA (NYSE:BG) is one of the 10 All-Time High But Still Undervalued Stocks to Invest In. On April 29, 2026, Bunge Global SA (NYSE:BG) reported Q1 adjusted EPS of $1.83 compared to $1.81 last year, while revenue totaled $21.86B versus $23.37B consensus. CEO Greg Heckman said the company delivered a “strong first quarter” […]
